ex.en: We had an unexpected visitor.

ex.en: They tried to unify the two teams.

ex.en: The lecture was rather uninteresting.

ex.en: The universe is vast and mysterious.
I won't go unless you come with me.
ex.ko: 당신이 저와 함께 가지 않는다면 저는 안 갈 거예요.

ex.en: It's unlikely to rain today.

ex.en: The weather here is unpredictable.
These two issues are unrelated.
ex.ko: 이 두 문제는 서로 관련이 없어요.

ex.en: His room is always untidy.

enOverride: up to the point in time when something happens

ex.en: We waited until the rain stopped.
It's unusually cold today.
She received unwanted advice.
He felt unwell this morning.
ex.ko: 그는 오늘 아침 몸이 안 좋았어요.

ex.en: Please update your information.

The bird sat on the upper branch.
The bedrooms are upstairs.
This is up-to-date information.

This is an urgent matter.
Check the usage of this word in a dictionary.

enOverride: referring to a past habit or state that no longer happens

ex.en: I used to live in Busan.
This old phone is useless now.
There is a vacancy for a manager position.
His answer was vague.
He is quite vain about his appearance.
ex.ko: 그는 자신의 외모에 대해 꽤 허영심이 많아요.

ex.en: This is a valuable painting.
They drove a van full of furniture.
This shop sells a variety of goods.
ex.ko: 이 가게는 여러 가지 상품을 팔아요.

ex.en: We attended a virtual meeting.

The mountain is visible from here.

ex.en: This is a great visual aid.

ex.en: She washed her hands in the washbowl.

enOverride: anything or everything that; no matter what

ex.en: Whatever you decide, I will support you.
ex.ko: 당신이 무엇을 결정하든 저는 지지할 거예요.

enOverride: at any time that; every time that

ex.en: Call me whenever you need help.
ex.ko: 도움이 필요할 때는 언제든지 저에게 전화하세요.

enOverride: in or to any place that

ex.en: I will follow you wherever you go.
ex.ko: 당신이 어디에 가든 저는 따라갈 거예요.

enOverride: used to introduce a choice between alternatives

ex.en: I don't know whether she is coming.

enOverride: any one that; no matter which

ex.en: Take whichever seat you like.
Let's rest for a while.
She spoke in a whisper.
The referee blew the whistle.

enOverride: any person who; no matter who

ex.en: Whoever finishes first wins.
The whole is greater than the sum of its parts.
There is widespread support for the plan.
ex.ko: 그 계획에 대한 광범위한 지지가 있어요.

ex.en: This park protects local wildlife.

enOverride: used to introduce a contrasting statement
